lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Greetings. Welcome to the Heroes' Guild.

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Only the greatest heroes of this land may gain entrance to this guild.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a hero - may I apply to join?

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: You're a hero? I've never heard of YOU. You are required to possess at least 55 quest points to file an application.

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Additionally you must have completed the Shield of Arrav, Lost City, Merlin's Crystal and Dragon Slayer I quests.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good for the foremost heroes of the land.

lines.speaker: Achietties
lines.text: Greetings. Welcome to the Heroes' Guild.
